app_meta.name: Vortex Text FX
app_meta.description: 7 high-end SVG text engines to transform standard fonts into layered, textured, and 3D masterpieces.

global_engine_specs.title: App Effects Documentation
global_engine_specs.description: This document describes all the effects available in the application, their behavior, and the configurable settings for each.

parameters.name: text
parameters.detail: The actual words or characters to be rendered.

parameters.name: font
parameters.detail: The font family applied to the text (e.g., 'Open Sans').

parameters.name: fontSize
parameters.detail: The size of the font in px (Range: 10–500, Default: 200).

parameters.name: color
parameters.detail: The primary hex color for the text.

parameters.name: fontWeight
parameters.detail: The weight of the font - 'normal' or 'bold'.

parameters.name: letterSpacing
parameters.detail: The manual kerning adjustment between characters in px.

effects_registry.short_desc: Generates a textured clipping mask using mathematical horizontal bars.

settings.name: spacing
settings.detail: Vertical distance between the center-lines (Default: 5).

settings.name: gap
settings.detail: Empty space between each line (Default: 5).

settings.name: thickness
settings.detail: Weight of the horizontal lines themselves (Default: 2).

effects_registry.short_desc: Simulates physical print bleed and grain for a dual-tone gradient aesthetic.

settings.name: gradientColorStart
settings.detail: Light end of the gradient starting at the top-left (Default: '#c084fc').

settings.name: gradientColorEnd
settings.detail: Deep end of the gradient at the bottom-right (Default: '#ec4899').

settings.name: gradientAngle
settings.detail: Angle of the gradient in degrees, from 0–360 (Default: 135).

settings.name: grainIntensity
settings.detail: Controls the strength of the noise texture from 0–100 (Default: 45).

settings.name: grainSize
settings.detail: Noise frequency, where a smaller value produces finer grain (Default: 0.65).

settings.name: edgeBlur
settings.detail: Creates a soft bleed at the shape boundaries in px (Default: 1.5).

settings.name: shadowColor
settings.detail: Dark tone underneath for depth (Default: '#1e1b4b').

effects_registry.short_desc: Stackable 3D layers with offset math for a classic arcade look.

settings.name: layers
settings.detail: Number of color layers to stack behind the base text (Default: 6).

settings.name: stepX / stepY
settings.detail: Horizontal and vertical offset distance in px between each successive layer (Default: 3 / 3).

settings.name: thickness
settings.detail: Applies a thickness adjustment scale for the extrusion (Default: 2).

settings.name: layerColors
settings.detail: A list of colors used for the stacked layers behind the text.

effects_registry.short_desc: Balloon-like volume created through inner shadow and specular highlight computation.

settings.name: inflateAmount
settings.detail: Blur radius used to computationally 'puff up' the underlying shape in px (Default: 8).

settings.name: highlightColor
settings.detail: Color of the specular highlight at the top-left (Default: '#ffffff').

settings.name: highlightOpacity
settings.detail: Transparency level of the highlight from 0–100 (Default: 90).

settings.name: shadowColor
settings.detail: Dark underside color indicating the curvature of the form (Default: '#000000').

settings.name: shadowOpacity
settings.detail: Transparency level of the underside shadow from 0–100 (Default: 35).

settings.name: dropShadowColor
settings.detail: Color for the ground shadow (Default: '#00000066').

effects_registry.short_desc: Mathematical curve-based fading using sliced linear segments.

settings.name: thickness
settings.detail: Stroke width for the sliced lines (Default: 2).

settings.name: gap
settings.detail: Interval separation between slices (Default: 3).

settings.name: direction
settings.detail: The fading behavior — 'top-to-bottom', 'bottom-to-top', or 'center-out' (Default: 'bottom-to-top').

settings.name: curve
settings.detail: Controls the aggressiveness of the fade (1 = linear, 3 = fast falloff) (Default: 2).

settings.name: minOpacity
settings.detail: The minimum opacity reached at the end of the fade (Default: 0).

effects_registry.short_desc: Converts curves into an 8-bit retro aesthetic using custom grid alignment.

settings.name: pixelSize
settings.detail: Size of each individual pixel cell in px (Default: 5).

settings.name: pixelGap
settings.detail: Space between cells. Negative values create overlapping/bolder results (Default: 1).

settings.name: letterSpacing
settings.detail: Additive spacing between separate characters (Default: 0).

settings.name: bgEnabled
settings.detail: Toggle for a solid block directly beneath the text bounds (Default: false).

settings.name: bgColor
settings.detail: Color for the background block (Default: '#E8472A').

settings.name: bgOpacity
settings.detail: Transparency level of the block, 0–100 (Default: 100).

effects_registry.short_desc: Generates a randomized alphanumeric matrix around your target word.

settings.name: cols / rows
settings.detail: The grid dimensions across and down (Default: 12 / 8).

settings.name: cellSize
settings.detail: Width/height constraints for each letter cell in px (Default: 80).

settings.name: fontSize
settings.detail: Internal letter font scaling inside each cell (Default: 48).

settings.name: wordDirection
settings.detail: The placement pattern — 'horizontal', 'vertical', or 'diagonal'.

settings.name: wordRow / wordCol
settings.detail: 0-indexed starting coordinates for the target word (Default: 3 / 3).

settings.name: seed
settings.detail: Randomization seed to reshuffle fillers without changing the word placement.

features.label: SVG Output
features.text: Perfectly crisp at any size within Canva.

features.label: Performance
features.text: Optimized React hooks for real-time preview updates.
